Bash(node.exe -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('c:/Users/zrs/Desktop/course/prototype/index.html', 'utf8'\); const lines = html.split\('\\\\n'\); let depth = 0; for \(let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++\) { const line = lines[i]; const opens = \(line.match\(/<div[\\\\s>]/g\) || []\).length; const closes = \(line.match\(/<\\\\/div>/g\) || []\).length; depth += opens - closes; if \(\(opens || closes\) && \(depth <= 2 || opens !== closes\)\) { console.log\('L' + \(i+1\) + ' d=' + depth + ' +' + opens + '/-' + closes + '  ' + line.trim\(\).substring\(0, 90\)\); } } console.log\('Final depth:', depth\);")
